actions.text:
OPERATION: TRAINING GROUNDS
SIMULATION WING / SECTOR A-13

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: This is a training sweep on paper. Treat it like deployment anyway.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Sector A-13 lost contact beyond this wing. We are not waiting for a second failure.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Use the yard terminals. They still carry the old incident briefings.

TRAINING CONSOLE
Incident drill package: Sector A-13 containment loss.
Scenario note: field teams are not to be told whether the exercise has gone live.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Training sweep complete. Your live assignment starts now.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: The blackout in the next sector is real. This was the last clean room.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Move to the access corridor. Recover logs before the sector goes completely dark.
